title: T-046 — Capacity Projection screen
prompt:
# T-046 — Capacity Projection screen

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-003, §11.1, §15.4 V-SCHED-04.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Promote the capacity projection prototype to a first-class advisory screen.

## Implementation contract
Server computes the utilization matrix; UI renders color thresholds consistently with design tokens and keeps export based on the same filtered dataset.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/capacity utilization grid and overload alerts.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_capacity_projection. Computes per-line per-day utilization from approved assignments and production line capacity; flags >100% hard violations and >90% amber warnings.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Planned capacity metrics are consumed downstream by OEE.

acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/capacity renders, then grid, utilization bars, alerts and export controls match pext_capacity_projection parity.
Given utilization >100% for a line/day, then V-SCHED-04 alert lists the offending WOs.
Given user changes horizon/line filters, then URL state updates and loader recomputes server-side.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED tests for util calculation thresholds and RTL prototype parity.
risk_red_lines: Do not compute capacity from draft assignments unless explicitly filtered.
Do not duplicate OEE ownership; this is planning projection only.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/optimizer-screens.jsx:113-206` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
